category_sources: Official Faircamp manual describes creating Faircamp sites and configuring catalogs, releases, tracks, and artists.
source_facts.description says Faircamp is a static site generator for audio producers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is `faircamp`; official manual and website use `Faircamp`.
docs_sources: Official Faircamp manual redirects to and is served from faircamp.org/docs/latest/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source-archive point to the official Codeberg source repository.
tags_sources: Official manual documents audio catalog manifests, releases, tracks, and going online.
source_facts.description identifies static site generation for audio producers.
